name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Put almonds on a baking sheet or pie pan and bake for about 5 minutes, just until lightly browned.
3. Grease muffin cups or line with muffin papers.
4. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix flour, sugar, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
5. In another bowl, break eggs. Add pumpkin and butter to eggs and whisk until well-blended.
6. Stir in chocolate chips and almonds.
7. Pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and fold until just combined.
8. Scoop into muffin tins and bake for 20-25 minutes.
